name: Cos(余弦)😶‍🌫️
fullText: 玩 OpenClaw/Claude Code/Codex/... 一段时间后，有没有发现，你以为多了几个 AI 员工来节省你的时间，但你每天却要不断引导它们，给它们续费，担心它们不积极，又担心它们乱搞，搞出一堆废品还浪费了海量 token，你比以前更忙了，睡的也少了，离开电脑还得带个手机来完成远程监工。

name: Polymarket
fullText: JUST IN: Host Conan O’Brien goes “brain-rot mode” at the Oscars, describing himself as “unc-coded with a bunch of famepilled NPCs”

name: Polymarket
fullText: BREAKING: Sean Penn wins the Oscar for Best Supporting Actor, as predicted by Polymarket. https://t.co/lbC7cMab2e
